business_description.nature_of_business: Freight transportation and warehousing; 9 locations across Ohio and Pennsylvania comprising 7 warehouse facilities, 1 service/repair facility, and 1 office; Motor Truck Cargo coverage indicates active trucking/freight operations

Current policy CU00005026 (2024, Hanover); prior: CU-0006463 (2023, Hartford), CU00005651 (2022, Auto-Owners), CU-5016-4404 (2021, Markel), 7CU0008415 (2020, CNA)

Current policy MT-0006135 (2024, Hanover); prior: 7MT0008387 (2023, Hartford), 0000009568 (2022, Auto-Owners), MT00006769 (2021, Markel), MT-0008150 (2020, CNA). Loss payee on file: Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc. - Entity 2, 1200 Nationwide Blvd., Columbus, OH 43215

positives: No mid-term policy cancellations in any of the 5 prior policy years (2020–2024)
Consistently maintained a comprehensive 6-line insurance program across all years
Stable aggregate program premium over 5 years ranging from 2014565.01 to 2088513.96 (~3.7% total variance)
Claim frequency declined year-over-year from peak of 13 (2023) to 10 (2024), suggesting possible loss control improvement
Historical low of 4 claims in 2020 demonstrates capacity for favorable loss performance
46 total reported claims across 5 years on a ~$2M annual premium program indicates manageable frequency relative to account size
concerns: Carrier changed every year for 5 consecutive years (CNA 2020 → Markel 2021 → Auto-Owners 2022 → Hartford 2023 → Hanover 2024), strongly suggesting repeated non-renewals or aggressive market-shopping
Claim frequency increased 225% from 4 claims (2020) to 13 claims (2023) over a 4-year period
Loss ratios not disclosed for any policy year across all 5 carriers, significantly limiting underwriting evaluation
No individual claim severity or reserve data provided
Own/lease tenancy status missing for 3 of 9 locations (LOC-002, LOC-004, LOC-005)
Fleet vehicle count, driver count, and radius of operation not provided despite active Commercial Auto and Motor Truck Cargo coverages
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year reported claim history: 2020 (4 claims, 2066794.82 premium, CNA Financial); 2021 (7 claims, 2019439.11 premium, Markel Corporation); 2022 (12 claims, 2014565.01 premium, Auto-Owners Insurance); 2023 (13 claims, 2074475.35 premium, Hartford Financial Services); 2024 (10 claims, 2088513.96 premium, Hanover Insurance Group). Total 5-year claims: 46. No cancellations any year. Individual loss amounts, reserves, and loss ratios not provided.
